benefits.description: Boosts endogenous GLP-1; 30g produces measurable increases in GLP-1 per studies

side_effects.description: GI distress possible at high doses (30g); recommends spreading over the day

protocol_notes: Recommends 30g/day glutamine split as 15g twice daily or 10g three times daily; references studies showing measurable GLP-1 increase; notes it won't raise GLP-1 nearly as much as GLP-1 agonists
